workplan: Develop reusable custom UI elements matching deep-green style tokens: stack-ordered BilingualText, SkeletonLoader shimmer, ProviderCard list rows, and TraceSheet bottom timelines.
decisions_made: Wrote BilingualText custom rendering framework that formats English on top and Urdu on the bottom with complete RTL directional support for Urdu text blocks
Developed SkeletonLoader built atop the shimmer package to display layout skeletons instead of loading circles
Engineered ProviderCard element utilizing precise 12px margins, border outline markers, on-time scores, rates, and detailed metrics chips
Wrote TraceSheet vertical stepper layout mapping step logs, latencies, input-output monospaces, and automated confirmation timestamps
outcome: Phase 3 complete. Master directory of high-fidelity widgets written.
